candidate.summary: Add a durable event-search fixture proving route, node, PR, CI, rollup, and blocker aliases.
candidate.reason: Node 10 added alias generation; node 21 adds an operator-facing fixture and production-readiness guard so alias evidence remains searchable across the long-run wave.

expected_behavior: Fixture covers route_evidence, node_evidence, pr_evidence, ci_evidence, rollup_evidence, and blocker_evidence.
Each search readback has at least one match.
Fixture and production-readiness guard keep all execution, approval, and mutation authority flags false.
risk: Low: fixture, test, readiness assertion, and evidence update only.
rollback: Revert the fixture, test, production-readiness assertion, workgraph update, and node evidence.
